name: AlertHub - Multi-Platform Notification System
description: A comprehensive notification platform that routes alerts across web, mobile, and desktop clients. Supports multiple delivery channels (Slack, Discord, email, push notifications) with intelligent routing, rate limiting, and user preferences. Built as a microservices architecture to demonstrate multi-agent orchestration across different tech stacks.
requirements: Notification Router Service (Rust/Axum) - High-performance core for receiving, validating, and routing notifications with rate limiting, priority queues, and deduplication
Integration Service (Bun/Elysia + Effect) - Handles delivery to external channels (Slack, Discord, email, webhooks) with type-safe error handling and retry logic
Admin API (Go/gRPC) - Management API for tenants, users, notification rules, and analytics with RBAC
Web Console (Next.js 15 + Effect) - Primary configuration interface with real-time notification feed, rule builder, and analytics
Mobile App (Expo/React Native) - Receive push notifications and manage preferences on mobile with biometric auth
Desktop Client (Electron) - System tray application for desktop notifications with keyboard shortcuts
Kubernetes Infrastructure (CloudNative-PG, Strimzi Kafka, Percona MongoDB, RabbitMQ, Redis/Valkey)
success_criteria: All backend services build, pass tests, and deploy successfully
All frontend applications build and deploy successfully
End-to-end notification flow works (submit → route → deliver → display)
WebSocket real-time updates function across web and desktop
Admin API CRUD operations work correctly
